notes: Reuters added the concrete defensive-access delta: Hugging Face used GLM-5.2 after U.S. frontier models refused the incident-response task, and OpenAI added Hugging Face to trusted access.
OpenAI signed a 25-year agreement for about 3.2 GW of power for Project Camellia, with cost, curtailment, and community commitments.
Alphabet disclosed Gemini 4 training, an almost-monthly model roadmap, acknowledged coding/agentic gaps, and raised 2026 capex guidance to $195B-$205B.
OpenAI Presence was published before the prior night cutoff and did not receive a post-night hard delta; omitted rather than retroactively padded.
